prompt: Create a ZIO HTTP server with a counter that starts at 0 and auto-increments by 1 every second, displaying the current count in real-time on a web page using Datastar.

assertions.text: Uses events { handler { ... } } wrapper (not event) for the SSE endpoint
Calls ServerSentEventGenerator.patchElements or patchSignals inside the SSE handler
Uses dataInit (not deprecated dataOn.load) to auto-trigger the SSE endpoint on page load
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Implements a loop or schedule so the counter increments repeatedly (not just once)
All three required imports are present: zio.http.datastar._, zio.http.template2._, and zio.http._
